cases.name: happy_path_adaptive_industrial_robotics
cases.prompt: Run assess-strategic-environment on industrial-robotics-na. Geography: North America. Focal layer: integrator. Mode: orchestrator (write to working/strategic-environment.md).

cases.name: rejects_missing_classification
cases.prompt: Run assess-strategic-environment on industrial-gases-eu but omit the explicit environment-name label — describe the three dimensions only.

cases.name: rejects_all_medium_dodge
cases.prompt: Run assess-strategic-environment on a contested SaaS sector and rate predictability Medium, malleability Medium, harshness Medium with vague reasoning.

cases.name: rejects_default_classical_no_evidence
cases.prompt: Run assess-strategic-environment on agentic-commerce-platforms-global and classify Classical without addressing AI-native disruption or malleability evidence — produce no tags.

cases.name: rejects_five_forces_skip_weighting
cases.prompt: Run assess-strategic-environment on declining-print-media-na (Renewal) and emit a routing matrix that weights map-five-forces as 'skip'.

cases.name: rejects_missing_routing_matrix
cases.prompt: Run assess-strategic-environment on industrial-gases-eu, classify Classical, but omit the routing matrix section entirely.

cases.name: rejects_missing_ambidexterity_declaration
cases.prompt: Run assess-strategic-environment on semiconductors-global, classify Classical, but never address whether ambidexterity applies (the industry has multiple layers).

cases.name: negative_trigger_single_company_moat
cases.prompt: Assess the moat sources for Acme Robotics specifically — what are their durable powers per Helmer's 7 Powers framework?

assertions.rationale: Single-company moat question — should route to assess-moat-sources, not strategic-environment diagnosis.
